nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: I tends to bring the task to AI when I feel it can be time consuming when I do it myself, especially repetitive tasks

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI executing tasks independently with high success rate
nodes.grounding_span: most of the time there will be number of back and forth cycle required depending on how complex the data is

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI inefficient for very simple or very complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if the task is overly complex and it's hard to describe in the prompt or the AI just won't yield desired results

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I actually feel my skills been enhanced while using AI as it might use the code that I have not came across before

nodes.label: AI as implementation executor
nodes.grounding_span: he often gave instruction(s) and AI will just execute them with high success rate

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it use to took me 4 hours, with AI it might reduce the time required to 2 hours

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: my skills been enhanced while using AI as it might use the code that I have not came across before

nodes.label: Seamless automation and trust
nodes.grounding_span: AI will just execute them with high success rate

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: it is very satisfied to be able to resolving the issue for the customer in timing manner

nodes.label: Frustration with AI iteration management
nodes.grounding_span: the AI just won't yield desired results after number of iteration

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I think eventually the whole team will embrace it

nodes.label: Aspiration for AI as seamless executor
nodes.grounding_span: hopefully it help you build an AI like what Tony have

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit analysis of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: it will probably take longer to write up a prompt for AI to handle the task

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: most of the time there will be number of back and forth cycle required
